items.prompt:
A hand-drawn educational infographic in the style of a high-quality bullet journal page.

Topic: 番茄工作法的 5 个核心步骤.

Aspect ratio: 3:4 portrait.

Background:
- Warm cream / off-white paper texture with subtle grain.
- Optional washi-tape strips in the corners (diagonal stripes, muted tones).
- DO NOT use pure white or pure black background.

Color palette:
- macaron — describe colors:
  - macaron: warm cream #F5F0E8 background, muted blue #A8D8EA, lavender #D5C6E0, mint #B5E5CF, peach #F8D5C4, coral red #E8655A accent
  - morandi: dusty sage, terracotta, mustard, taupe, soft brick
  - kraft: kraft paper background, dark brown ink, tomato red accent, muted navy
  - chalkboard: dark slate background, white chalk, yellow / coral / mint chalk highlights
- Limit to 4-5 colors total. Use the accent color sparingly for emphasis.

Title:
- "番茄工作法 5 步" in large hand-lettered calligraphy at the top.
- Title sits inside a hand-drawn frame: irregular oval, scalloped rectangle, or wavy banner.
- Optional subtitle below in smaller handwritten print.

Body:
- 5 information items.
- Each item is presented as a hand-drawn card / rounded rectangle / cloud bubble / circle, with:
  - A number badge (1, 2, 3 ... in a circle, drawn by hand)
  - Item title in bold handwritten text
  - 1-2 lines of body text in neat handwritten print
  - A simple doodle icon (1-2 strokes, NOT realistic) representing the item
- Items can be arranged: vertical list / 2-column grid / circular wheel / winding path.

Doodle decorations (sprinkle naturally, not symmetrically):
- Tiny stars, sparkles, hearts, arrows-curvy, dotted lines, exclamation marks
- Hand-drawn underlines and circle-marks for emphasis on key words
- Smiley / frowny faces (😊 ☹) as quality indicators where relevant
- Optional: a single mascot character (a cat / a stick-figure person / a coffee cup with face) as the "narrator"

Style enforcement:
- ALL lines have visible hand-drawn wobble — never perfectly straight
- ALL color fills leave a tiny gap before the outline (hand-painted feel)
- All text is hand-lettered — NO computer fonts, NO Helvetica, NO Arial
- Slight imperfection is intentional — it should NOT look digitally precise
- The whole image feels like a single page from someone's notebook

Composition:
- Generous whitespace (~30-40% of the canvas)
- Information hierarchy: title > item titles > body > doodle decorations
- Items are large enough to be readable; do not cram

Language: 中文（手写体感）; technical / proper nouns can stay in English.

items.name: Veo·五段式基础(80年代复古)
items.desc: 官方五段式示范:镜头+主体+动作+场景+风格,复古胶片颗粒
items.prompt: Medium shot, a tired corporate worker, rubbing his temples in exhaustion, in front of a bulky 1980s computer in a cluttered office late at night. The scene is lit by the harsh fluorescent overhead lights and the green glow of the monochrome monitor. Retro aesthetic, shot as if on 1980s color film, slightly grainy.
items.src: deepmind.google Veo 官方 prompt guide

items.name: Veo·摇臂揭示(史诗奇幻)
items.desc: 从低机位升起揭示晨雾峡谷,揭示型运镜范本
items.prompt: Crane shot starting low on a lone hiker and ascending high above, revealing they are standing on the edge of a colossal, mist-filled canyon at sunrise, epic fantasy style, awe-inspiring, soft morning light.

items.name: Veo·浅景深情绪特写
items.desc: 雨夜公交少女望窗,冷蓝忧郁,情绪特写范本
items.prompt: Close-up with very shallow depth of field, a young woman's face, looking out a bus window at the passing city lights with her reflection faintly visible on the glass, inside a bus at night during a rainstorm, melancholic mood with cool blue tones, moody, cinematic.

items.name: Veo·180°弧线+唱词
items.desc: 环绕歌手正面到背后POV,带一句唱词(对白写法示范)
items.prompt: The camera performs a smooth 180-degree arc shot, starting with the front-facing view of the singer and circling around her to seamlessly end on the POV shot from behind her on stage. The singer sings "when you look me in the eyes, I can see a million stars."

items.name: Veo·时间轴分镜脚本(8秒)
items.desc: 按[00:00-00:02]分段写景别+动作+SFX+Emotion,一条prompt排完8秒
items.prompt: [00:00-00:02] Medium shot from behind a young female explorer with a leather satchel and messy brown hair in a ponytail, as she pushes aside a large jungle vine to reveal a hidden path. [00:02-00:04] Reverse shot of the explorer's freckled face, her expression filled with awe as she gazes upon ancient, moss-covered ruins in the background. SFX: The rustle of dense leaves, distant exotic bird calls. [00:04-00:06] Tracking shot following the explorer as she steps into the clearing and runs her hand over the intricate carvings on a crumbling stone wall. Emotion: Wonder and reverence. [00:06-00:08] Wide, high-angle crane shot, revealing the lone explorer standing small in the center of the vast, forgotten temple complex, half-swallowed by the jungle. SFX: A swelling, gentle orchestral score begins to play.

items.name: Veo·JSON模板(咖啡师)
items.desc: JSON结构化:camera/lens/audio分层,便于批量改参

items.name: Veo·JSON模板(火星宇航员)
items.desc: 六字段JSON:scene/style/camera/lighting/audio/color_palette
items.prompt:
{
  "scene": "A lone astronaut stands on the Martian surface, gazing at Earth.",
  "style": "Cinematic",
  "camera": "Wide shot, slow zoom-in",
  "lighting": "Soft, ambient glow",
  "audio": "Ambient wind, soft electronic hum",
  "color_palette": "Red and orange hues"
}

items.name: Veo·JSON模板(产品展示)
items.desc: 极简产品JSON:旋转特写+干净光,电商可直接改产品名
items.prompt:
{
  "scene": "A smartwatch spinning slowly on a sleek glass surface.",
  "style": "Minimalist, with a clean background.",
  "camera": "Close-up, rotating around the watch.",
  "lighting": "Soft, clean lighting highlighting the watch face.",
  "audio": "Subtle electronic beats."
}

items.name: Kling·电影感(冰原宇航员)
items.desc: 公式=主体+运动+场景+(运镜+光+氛围),克制情绪示范
items.prompt: A medium-wide shot of a lone astronaut walking across a frozen black-sand shoreline at dawn. The camera slowly pushes in as icy mist drifts across the frame. Style is cinematic realism with pale blue morning light, silver-gray tones, and soft atmospheric haze. Motion should feel natural and emotionally restrained. Audio includes distant wind, ice cracking, and faint radio static. Keep the scene visually grounded and realistic.

items.name: Kling·产品广告(香水)
items.desc: 微距起手+缓慢环绕揭示,奢品打光,产品广告骨架
items.prompt: A luxury perfume bottle on a black stone pedestal in a dark studio. Start with an extreme macro close-up on the glass edge, then the camera slowly orbits to reveal the full bottle. Show glossy reflections, embossed gold lettering, and fine mist in the air. Style is premium commercial advertising with soft rim lighting, deep shadows, and warm highlights. Motion should feel elegant and precise. Audio includes a delicate glass chime and a soft cinematic whoosh. Preserve the bottle proportions and readable label details.

items.name: Kling·社媒钩子(球鞋水花)
items.desc: 前1秒水花炸向镜头,低机位快跟,短视频开屏钩子
items.prompt: An attention-grabbing close-up of a bright red sneaker landing in a shallow puddle on a city street. The first second should show water exploding toward the lens in slow motion. The camera tracks low and fast across the ground. Style is bold and crisp for short-form ad content. Lighting is bright overcast daylight with sharp texture on the shoe. Motion should feel energetic and clean. Audio includes a hard bass hit, splash sound, and fast urban ambience.

items.name: Kling·对白独白(侦探)
items.desc: 锁定机位纪实感+片尾对白写法(The character says:)
items.prompt: A medium close-up of a tired detective in a dim apartment kitchen, speaking directly to camera. The camera is locked off with a slight documentary feel. Style is gritty cinematic realism. Lighting is low-key with a flickering fluorescent overhead and cool dawn light from the window. Motion should remain subtle and realistic. Audio includes quiet room tone, distant traffic, and refrigerator hum. The character says: I should have left this case alone.

items.name: Runway·油画呼吸风景
items.desc: Gen-4心法:文本只写运动!画面如油画缓慢呼吸,光由暖转冷
items.prompt: The entire scene breathes slowly as if painted with oil. Clouds shift and reform with visible brushstroke texture. Trees sway with exaggerated, flowing motion. Light changes from warm gold to cool blue gradually across the duration. Camera holds wide and static.
items.src: Runway 官方 Gen-4 指南衍生模板

items.name: Runway·产品360自转
items.desc: 匀速无加减速的360°自转,光照恒定,图生视频产品位
items.prompt: The product rotates smoothly 360 degrees on its axis. Lighting remains consistent throughout the rotation. Each angle reveals a different surface detail. The rotation is slow and steady with no acceleration or deceleration. Clean, controlled motion.

items.name: Runway·悬浮超现实
items.desc: 小物缓缓离面悬浮,失重感但光照写实,超现实氛围
items.prompt: Objects in the scene slowly lift from their surfaces and hover. Books, pens, cups, small items all float upward gradually. The rising is slow and weightless. The lighting remains grounded and realistic despite the surreal motion.

items.name: Sora2·科教实验室(分层+beats)
items.desc: 官方分层法:Scene/Camera/Lens/Lighting/beats/Dialogue/约束 全套示范
items.prompt: Scene: a scientist in a high tech lab, holographic displays, glass tubes emitting soft glows, ambient mist. Camera: medium close up, slight low angle, slow dolly in. Lens & focus: focal length ~85 mm equivalent, shallow depth of field (background soft blur). Lighting & palette: key light from top left, fill light subtle, rim light behind, palette anchors: teal, amber, white. Actions / beats: Step 1: scientist reaches hand toward hologram. Step 2: hologram reacts, swirling data particles rising. Dialogue: Scientist: 'Projecting real time quantum map.' Optional constraints: no watermark, no big text overlays, avoid interface wires
items.src: OpenAI Sora2 官方 Cookbook 风格模板

items.name: Sora2·日落悬崖叙事
items.desc: 宽景+缓摇+暖金光双beats,无对白叙事片范本
items.prompt: Scene: a person standing at cliff's edge at sunset, wind in hair, ocean waves far below. Camera: wide shot, framing with subject off center, slow pan from right to left. Lens & focus: deep depth of field so both subject and background are sharp. Lighting & palette: warm golden light from setting sun, soft fill from below, palette: gold, blue, slate. Actions / beats: Step 1: person takes a deep breath, looks out. Step 2: hair and clothes flutter in wind. Dialogue: none. Optional constraints: no lens flare, no UI overlays, avoid noise artifacts

items.name: Sora2·产品演示(含插入镜头)
items.desc: 三步动作+Insert A/B特写插入镜头写法,产品演示片
items.prompt: Scene: desk in modern home office, laptop open showing interface, a user's hand and smartphone next to it. Camera: medium wide shot angled down slightly, gentle push in. Lens & focus: moderate depth of field, background subtle blur. Lighting & palette: soft daylight window plus fill light, palette: white, blue, slate. Action / steps: Step 1: user taps smartphone, app screen lights. Step 2: laptop mirrors or interacts. Step 3: charts animate on screen. Optional close up inserts: Insert A: finger tapping smartphone. Insert B: zoom on animated chart on laptop. Optional constraints: no UI outside screen, minimal clutter, no text watermark

items.name: Seedance·Master万能骨架
items.desc: 6步公式满血版:SUBJECT/ACTION/CAMERA/ENVIRONMENT/LIGHTING/ATMOSPHERE+质量与约束尾巴,填空即用
items.prompt: [Industry Style], SUBJECT: [main subject] ACTION: [one clear action] CAMERA: [shot size]+[one camera move]+[lens] ENVIRONMENT: [location & details] LIGHTING: [physical lighting] ATMOSPHERE: [environmental effects] VISUAL QUALITY: Photorealistic, cinematic composition, premium production design, high detail textures, realistic physics, natural motion, professional color grading, depth of field, subtle reflections CONSTRAINTS: No distortion, no flickering, no extra objects, stable composition, clean motion, consistent identity

items.name: Seedance·奢品香水
items.desc: 冷凝水滴落+缓慢环绕移轨+高对比反射,奢品味
items.prompt: A clear glass perfume bottle sits on a black stone pedestal in a dark studio. Condensation rolls slowly down the glass as a single drop falls onto the surface below. Medium close-up with a slow circular dolly move. Soft side lighting, high contrast reflections, luxury beauty-ad look. Subtle room tone and one sharp glass tap. Stable product shape, clean label detail, natural motion.

items.name: Seedance·时尚人像跟拍
items.desc: 红裙走廊走姿跟拍+侧光编辑感+一致性收尾
items.prompt: A model in a flowing crimson gown walks slowly toward the camera down an empty concrete corridor, fabric trailing in the air behind her. Medium tracking shot following her stride, eye-level framing. Cool directional side light, high-fashion editorial look, muted background tones. Faint echoing footsteps. Consistent face and wardrobe, natural walk cycle, confident expression.

items.name: Seedance·自然航拍
items.desc: 皮划艇+无人机后拉升起揭示山湖,风光片骨架
items.prompt: A lone red kayak cuts across a glassy turquoise lake at sunrise, leaving a soft wake behind it. Wide aerial drone shot slowly pulling back and rising to reveal pine forest and snow-capped peaks. Golden morning light, crisp natural color, subtle mist on the water. Quiet ambient wind and distant birdsong. Stable horizon, smooth motion, photorealistic detail.

items.name: Seedance·美食纪实(官方例)
items.desc: 静态中景略俯拍主厨切菜,纪实美食质感
items.prompt: Professional chef in white uniform and tall toque, mid-30s with focused expression, chopping vegetables on wooden cutting board with smooth rhythmic knife movements, static medium shot from slightly elevated angle showing hands and cutting surface, modern commercial kitchen with stainless steel surfaces and hanging pots in soft background blur, warm overhead task lighting with natural window light supplement creating soft shadows, photorealistic culinary documentary style with rich colors and sharp detail.

items.name: 案例·未来家居全息交互(JSON)
items.desc: 六层JSON大满贯:shot/subject/scene/visual/cinematography/audio,科幻片教科书

items.name: 案例·乐高口技冒险
items.desc: 镜头穿梭乐高世界+全口技音效+画面随声响应,创意片
items.prompt: A dynamic camera glides through a miniature LEGO world, where an epic adventure unfolds. All sound effects—footsteps, explosions, cars, dragons—are created using mouth sounds by a single AI-generated voice artist. As each sound is made, the visuals instantly respond: LEGO characters jump into action, cars race, spaceships take off, volcanoes erupt. The journey moves through LEGO-built environments—city streets, underwater ruins, space stations, and lava lairs. Fast-paced, playful, visually rich, like a blend between The LEGO Movie and next-gen AI storytelling.

items.name: 案例·ASMR玻璃炸鸡(吃播)
items.desc: 超写实玻璃食物+咬碎脆响+台词,怪奇吃播流量款
items.prompt: Front-facing static shot. A woman enthusiastically bites into a hyper-realistic glass fried chicken leg. As it cracks delicately in her mouth, she smiles and says, "Zero calories, zero cruelty, 100% crunch.... vegan life, baby!" Subtle ASMR crunching sounds. Soft lighting, mukbang video style, playful and bizarre tone.

items.name: 案例·ASMR切玻璃火龙果
items.desc: 薄刃划透明水果+碎片闪光,手术般宁静切物ASMR
items.prompt: Static shot. A man delicately slices a hyper-realistic glass dragon fruit on a pristine cutting board. The whisper-thin blade glides through the transparent fruit, scattering soft-glimmering shards. Surgical, serene lighting. Hyper-clean, ASMR video.

items.name: 案例·ASMR煎牛排
items.desc: 俯拍滋滋煎烤+蒸汽卷曲+食品广告级质感
items.prompt: Top-down static shot. A thick slice of marbled steak sizzles on a hot black pan, juices bubbling as the surface caramelizes. Steam rises in soft curls, catching warm, directional kitchen light. Rich textures and ASMR sounds evoke savory satisfaction. Hyper-real, food-commercial style.

items.name: 案例·公鸡体操(恶搞)
items.desc: 跟拍公鸡跳马腾空+裁判亮分,超现实奥运讽刺
items.prompt: A dynamic tracking shot. A rooster launches off a gymnastics vault, flipping mid-air with feathers flying in slow motion. It sticks the landing perfectly, wings spread in a proud pose. Judges flash "10.0" scorecards. Bright stadium lights, roaring crowd. Playful, surreal Olympic parody.

items.name: 案例·女主播播客口播
items.desc: 正面静态+耳机低语+俏皮台词,口播视频模板(No subtitle)
items.prompt: Front static shot. A woman hosts a podcast at a desk, speaking softly into a mic with low tones, whispering. Wearing headphones, she grins and says: "Confidence? Oh, honey, I don't walk into a room—I glide in like I own the Wi-Fi." Soft studio lighting, cozy, playful, and empowering podcast energy. No subtitle.

items.name: 案例·ASMR切猕猴桃
items.desc: 经典ASMR开场:薄刃切超写实水果+结晶光泽
items.prompt: Static shot. A chef delicately slices a hyper-realistic kiwi on a spotless cutting board. The green flesh and glistening black seeds fracture cleanly under a whisper-thin blade. Each slice emits a soft, crystalline shimmer, ASMR. The atmosphere is surgical, serene, and visually pristine.

items.name: 广告·磨砂精华瓶冷雾(0-6s时间轴)
items.desc: 广告级:分段时间轴+微距冷凝水+一致性护栏,[brand]替换
items.prompt: A frosted-glass serum bottle stands on wet black slate, half-buried in low-rolling cold fog, a single cool key light raking from camera-left. 0-2s: extreme macro push-in across the condensation field, beads trembling and sliding, dewy texture razor-sharp at f2.8. 2-4s: the mist thins on a slow exhale, the glass pipette lifts and one amber drop releases in slow motion. 4-6s: a 30-degree clockwise orbit wraps a warm rim light around the [brand] label. Bottle holds constant shape, fill level, and matte finish throughout — no deformation, drift, melting, or flicker. Implied sound: low room tone, a soft glass tick, one droplet plink.

items.name: 广告·球鞋360转台
items.desc: 隐形转台+凝胶灯扫鞋底+针脚不变形护栏,球鞋硬广
items.prompt: A single hero sneaker rests on an invisible acrylic turntable inside a seamless graphite cyclorama, dust motes drifting in the light. 0-2s: low hero angle, slow dolly-in as a hard top light rakes the knit upper. 2-4s: the shoe makes a controlled 180-degree turntable rotation while a magenta-to-teal gel sweep travels the outsole lugs. 4-6s: the spin eases to a clean three-quarter front, the sole flexing once, the [brand] heel logo tack-sharp. Upper keeps the same lace pattern, colorway, and silhouette — no warping, smearing, duplicated eyelets, or temporal flicker. Sound: airy whoosh, faint rubber squeak, a deep sub hit on the lock.

items.name: 广告·意式浓缩克丽玛(8s)
items.desc: 顶拍萃取+逆光蒸汽+方糖涟漪,液体物理护栏,咖啡广告
items.prompt: A matte ceramic cup sits centered on warm travertine, hard morning side-window light slanting across the scene. 0-2s: top-down macro of a thick crema-rich espresso stream falling from a polished portafilter, blooming into tiger-striped crema as steam curls off it. 2-3s: tilt to a low table-level angle, golden backlight igniting the rising vapor. 3-5s: a slow lateral truck around the cup as a single sugar cube drops, concentric ripples spreading through the crema in slow motion. 5-8s: settle on a hero three-quarter with the [brand] foil bag glinting behind. Liquid keeps believable viscosity, crema reads as a continuous skin — no smearing, ghosting, or broken-stream artifacts. Sound: gurgle of extraction, hiss of steam, a single ceramic clink.

items.name: 广告·耳机悬浮爆炸视图
items.desc: 零重力拆解+青色描边扫缝+磁吸合体,数码产品揭幕
items.prompt: Wireless earbuds and their charging case float in exploded-view layout against a deep-navy gradient void, lit by one soft overhead box. 0-2s: components drift apart in zero gravity — lid, both buds, and silicone tips suspended and slowly rotating, brushed-metal and matte-plastic surfaces catching crisp specular highlights. 2-4s: a parallax orbit left as a cyan accent edge-light traces every seam. 4-6s: the parts magnetically draw back together and seat with a clean close, [brand] etched on the hinge. Each part holds constant geometry, scale, and finish — no jitter, duplication, intersection clipping, or warping. Sound: weightless hum, a magnetic click, soft confirmation chime.

items.name: UGC·浴室镜前护肤实测
items.desc: 手持自拍+雾镜+素颜真实感,带货UGC模板,脸型一致护栏
items.prompt: Handheld phone selfie shot into a slightly steamed bathroom mirror, woman early-30s in an oversized tee, dewy bare skin, no makeup. 0-2s: she leans toward the glass and taps the [brand] serum bottle against the camera, half-laughing mid-sentence. 2-4s: micro-zoom in as she presses two drops onto her cheekbone, fingertips spreading in small circles, window light catching the sheen. 4-6s: she turns her face slowly side to side, raising one eyebrow at her own reflection. Warm morning window light, soft skin texture with visible pores. Face shape and skin finish stay consistent — no deformation, drift, or artifacts. Implied sound: muffled running tap, a quiet "okay... wow."

items.name: 品牌·Logo粒子组装产品(JSON)
items.desc: 标志碎成粒子重组为产品落地,品牌揭幕片,JSON可改品牌
items.prompt:
{
  "description": "Cinematic shot of a dark, textured backdrop illuminated by cool directional lighting. The Nike Swoosh hovers midair, glowing faintly. It begins to pulse with energy, then shatters into thousands of tiny particles. The particles swirl rapidly and begin to form a Nike running shoe midair—assembling piece by piece in a precise, fluid motion. Once fully formed, the shoe descends gently onto the surface and flexes subtly. A single soft footstep echoes before the scene fades to black.",
  "style": "cinematic", "camera": "fixed wide angle",
  "lighting": "moody, cool-toned with sharp directional contrast on a dark background",
  "motion": "Swoosh pulses and explodes into particles, which swirl and reform into a shoe; the shoe descends and flexes slightly",
  "ending": "shoe lands gently, flexes, footstep is heard, then fade to black",
  "keywords": ["16:9", "brand reveal", "particle animation", "shoe assembly", "cinematic", "cool lighting"]
}

items.name: 照片转Q版3D求婚场景
items.desc: 情侣照转Q版3D,人物Q萌+环境写实的反差玩法
items.prompt: Transform the two people in the photo into chibi-style 3D cartoon characters. Change the scene to a proposal setting, with a soft pastel-colored floral arch in the background. Use romantic tones for the overall background. Rose petals are scattered on the ground. While the characters are rendered in cute chibi 3D style, the environment—including the arch, lighting, and textures—should be realistic and photorealistic.

items.name: 吉卜力风一键重绘
items.desc: 最省事的一句话风格迁移;若触发政策可加一句允许改敏感背景
items.prompt: Redraw this photo in Ghibli style

items.name: 手办与真人同框
items.desc: 桌面手办+真人同姿势同框,[角色名]可替换任意IP
items.prompt: In a casual, everyday style as if shot on a mobile phone, an anime figure of [Jackie Chan] is placed on a desk, striking an exaggerated and cool pose, fully equipped. Simultaneously, the corresponding real-life person also appears in the frame, striking a similar pose to the figure, creating an interesting visual contrast with the figure and the real person in the same frame. The overall composition is harmonious and natural, delivering a warm and vibrant, true-to-life visual experience.

items.name: 破框而出集换卡牌
items.desc: 角色冲出卡面的维度破裂电影感,核心词 dimensional break + motion depth
items.prompt: An ultra-photorealistic, cinematic-style illustration depicting [Lara Croft] dynamically bursting through the frame of an "[Archaeological Adventure]" trading card. She is caught mid-jump or swinging on a rope, wearing her iconic outfit and firing dual pistols. The muzzle flashes help shatter the card's ancient stone-carved border, creating a visible dimensional rupture with energy cracks and spatial distortions, scattering dust and debris outward. Her body lunges forward with powerful momentum, breaking through the card's flat plane, emphasizing strong motion depth. Inside the card (the background) is dense jungle ruins. The title "[Archaeological Adventure]" and the name "[Lara Croft]" remain visible on the remaining cracked parts of the card. Adventurous, dynamic lighting.

items.name: 实物+手绘涂鸦广告
items.desc: 白底真实物体与黑墨涂鸦互动的极简创意广告,四个[]变量
items.prompt: A minimalist and creative advertisement set on a clean white background. A real [Real Object] is integrated into a hand-drawn black ink doodle, using loose, playful lines. The [Doodle Concept] interacts with the object in a clever, imaginative way. Include bold black [Ad Copy] text at the top or center. Place the [Brand Logo] clearly at the bottom. The visual should be clean, fun, high-contrast, and conceptually smart.

items.name: 插画转手办(包装盒+建模界面)
items.desc: 全网最火玩法:角色变手办+身后包装盒+Blender界面+圆底座
items.prompt: turn this photo into a character figure. Behind it, place a box with the character's image printed on it, and a computer showing the Blender modeling process on its screen. In front of the box, add a round plastic base with the character figure standing on it. set the scene indoors if possible

items.name: 定制大理石雕塑
items.desc: 任意主体变打光考究的写实大理石雕塑
items.prompt: A photorealistic image of an ultra-detailed sculpture of the subject in image made of shining marble. The sculpture should display smooth and reflective marble surface, emphasizing its luster and artistic craftsmanship. The design is elegant, highlighting the beauty and depth of marble. The lighting in the image should enhance the sculpture's contours and textures, creating a visually stunning and mesmerizing effect.

items.name: 浮世绘风收藏卡牌
items.desc: 浮世绘/鬼灭风竖版收藏卡+全息箔+和风边框,{}填角色
items.prompt:
Core Instruction: A Japanese Ukiyoe style collectible trading card design, vertical composition, mimicking the visual aesthetics of "Demon Slayer": ink outlines with varying thickness, traditional woodblock print color schemes, dramatic dynamic composition.
Subject: The protagonist is {Character Name} (Title: {Hashira Title}), in a dynamic fighting pose, holding {Weapon}. Performing {Breathing Style Move}, surrounded by {Visual Effect, e.g. giant flames / water dragon} in Traditional Japanese Sumi-e style.
Background: blend a textured Holographic Foil effect shimmering beneath the ink elements.
Border: a decorative border of Traditional Japanese Patterns (Seigaiha / Asanoha); a bottom banner with "{Japanese Kanji Name}" in ancient calligraphy.

items.name: 经纬度+时间戳生成场景
items.desc: 只给GPS坐标和时间,靠模型世界知识重建当时当地画面
items.prompt: Create an image at 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W, on September 11, 2001, at 08:46

items.name: 参考角色克隆30人满屋
items.desc: 一张参考图生成30个同脸同装角色,前中后景纵深自然分布
items.prompt: Based on the uploaded reference character, shoot a real-life scene in a spacious Tokyo girl's apartment (1LDK): white walls, warm wooden floors, beige curtains, a low bed, a desk with cosmetics, bookshelves, plants, a standing mirror, a rug, a compact kitchen at the back. Strong depth of field with distinct foreground, middle ground, and deep background. Place about thirty characters identical to the reference (face, hairstyle, clothing all identical), each in a different action or interaction. Vary distance, scale, height and visibility so the room density looks natural (foreground figures partially occluded / slightly out of focus, middle-ground figures in main activities, background figures smaller).

items.name: 品牌微缩概念店(盲盒风)
items.desc: 品牌招牌产品外形的C4D盲盒微缩店,{Brand Name}替换
items.prompt: 3D chibi-style miniature concept store of {Brand Name}, creatively designed with an exterior inspired by the brand's most iconic product or packaging (such as a giant {brand's core product, e.g. chicken bucket / hamburger / donut}). Two floors with large glass windows showcasing the cozy, finely decorated interior: {brand's primary color}-themed decor, warm lighting, staff in brand outfits. Adorable tiny figures stroll along the street with benches, street lamps, potted plants. Rendered in a miniature cityscape style using Cinema 4D, blind-box toy aesthetic, rich in detail, soft relaxing afternoon lighting. --ar 2:3

items.name: 巨型易拉罐微缩施工队(JSON)
items.desc: 产品放大成摩天楼+微缩工人施工,超写实比例反差广告

items.name: 悬浮汉堡英雄食品广告
items.desc: 空中悬浮+酱汁飞溅冻结,换酱汁/背景色即得系列图
items.prompt: Hyper-realistic hero shot of a hot burger in midair with thick tartar sauce bursting around it, flecks of capers, dill, and chopped pickles frozen in motion. The sauce flows like creamy waves, dancing around the juicy burger layers. Bright lemon-yellow background with moody studio backlight creates a gourmet, refreshing tone, ultra-detailed commercial look. --ar 3:4

items.name: 花体字母Logo重设计
items.desc: 品牌首字母做成奢华花体纹章+下方官方logo,纯平面矢量
items.prompt:
A flat, minimalist vector design featuring a highly stylized single letter monogram with the official brand logo below it, for [BRAND NAME].
MONOGRAM: only the first letter of "[BRAND NAME]", "Ornamental Vector Typography" with high calligraphic artistry, elegant flourishes / exaggerated swashes / ornamental serifs, clean precise smooth vector.
BRAND IDENTIFIER: directly below, centrally, the actual official logo of "[BRAND NAME]", rendered significantly smaller.
FINISH: absolutely zero texture, embossing, shadows, or gradients — a perfectly flat illustration.
COLOR: solid flat background chosen to fit the brand vibe; monogram in a single flat high-contrast color; the small logo monochrome (solid white OR dark gray for best readability).

items.name: 超英手套×产品电影海报(JSON)
items.desc: 漫威手套紧握产品+风暴闪电背景,史诗产品硬广
items.prompt:
{
  "focus_object": "Coca-Cola Can",
  "character_element": "Iron Man's Gauntlet gripping it",
  "environment": "blurred stormy city skyline, rain, lightning bolts, water splashes",
  "lighting": "cinematic / metallic",
  "mood": "epic, technological",
  "style": "photorealistic, dynamic hero product shot"
}

items.name: Midjourney v7 参数速查表
items.desc: 20个常用参数一行一个;注意V8.x可能弃用--oref/--cref,现场以官方为准
items.prompt:
--v 7               选用V7模型
--ar 16:9           画幅(4:5/3:2/1:1…)
--s 0-1000          风格化强度(默认100)
--chaos 0-100       四宫格差异随机性
--weird 0-3000      非常规奇异美学
--exp 0-100         实验增强(细节/动态)
--style raw         弱化MJ默认审美,更"直译"
--sref <url/code>   风格参考(迁移美学)
--sw 0-1000         风格参考权重(默认100)
--cref <url>        角色参考(锁角色一致)
--cw 0-100          角色权重(低=只锁脸,高=含发型服装)
--oref <url>        V7全能参考(迁移主体,2xGPU)
--ow 0-1000         Omni权重
--no <term>         负向排除
--tile              无缝平铺图案
--draft             草稿模式10倍速半价
--seed <int>        固定种子可复现
--stop 10-100       提前停渲(越低越柔)
--q                 质量档(版本间有差异,现场核)
items.src: MJ 官方 Parameter List + blakecrosley.com 交叉核对

items.name: Higgsfield 机身预设(电影质感)
items.desc: 给画面'上机身':6种胶片/数字机身,写进prompt或选预设
items.prompt: Modular 8K Digital / Full-Frame Cine Digital / Grand Format 70mm Film / Studio Digital S35 / Classic 16mm Film / Premium Large Format Digital

items.name: Higgsfield 镜头预设(11种)
items.desc: 给画面'上镜头':移轴/变形宽银幕/微距/70s定焦/旋焦人像/光晕柔化等;一次最多叠3个运镜
items.prompt: Creative Tilt Lens(移轴) / Compact Anamorphic(紧凑变形) / Extreme Macro(极致微距) / 70s Cinema Prime(70年代定焦) / Classic Anamorphic(经典变形宽银幕) / Premium Modern Prime(现代高级定焦) / Warm Cinema Prime(暖调电影定焦) / Swirl Bokeh Portrait(旋焦人像) / Vintage Prime(复古定焦) / Halation Diffusion(光晕柔化) / Clinical Sharp Prime(临床级锐利)

items.name: Veo3 音频/对白写法速查
items.desc: Veo3原生带声:对白放引号内嵌叙述;声景用 Audio: 标签;分段脚本用 SFX:/Emotion: 标注
items.prompt:
对白: ...she says in a weary voice, "Of all the offices in this town, you had to walk into mine."
声景: Audio: Crunchy, sugary typing sounds, delighted giggles.
分段音效: SFX: The rustle of dense leaves, distant exotic bird calls.
情绪标注: Emotion: Wonder and reverence.
items.src: deepmind.google Veo 官方 prompt guide
